homeNav.title: Control center
homeNav.description: Browse every admin section and jump straight to the tools you need.

userManagement.description: Create and manage student, teacher, and parent accounts. Review profiles, roles, permissions, and account status across the platform.

schoolManagement.description: Register schools, update their details, and monitor participation. Manage subscriptions, educational stages, and school-level settings.

courseManagement.description: Review submitted courses, approve or reject content, and track publishing status. Keep the learning catalog organized and up to date.

bundleManagement.description: Create and manage discounted course bundles for students. Group courses, set bundle pricing, and control availability across the catalog.

invoiceManagement.description: Track invoices, payment transactions, and active enrollments. Review revenue, monitor billing activity, and manage gateway settings.

helperFileManagement.description: Upload, organize, and maintain helper documents that support lessons and exams. Preview files and keep shared resources accessible.

pricingManagement.description: Configure subscription plans, pricing tiers, and payment-related settings. Track transactions and manage billing for schools and users.

articleEditor.description: Moderate community articles, review submissions, and manage editorial workflows. Keep published content aligned with platform standards.

interactiveBooks.description: Manage interactive book projects, linked courses, and learning assets. Control how digital books are presented to students.

chatGroups.description: Create and supervise educational chat groups. Manage members, conversations, and group settings for teachers and students.

sendNotification.description: Compose targeted notifications for students, teachers, or schools. Schedule delivery and choose the right audience for each message.

questionBank.description: Build and maintain the central question library. Add, edit, preview, and categorize questions used across tests and assessments.

adsManagement.description: Create promotional campaigns and in-app announcements. Track ad placement, targeting, and performance across the platform.

curriculumManagement.description: Define education levels, grades, and subjects that structure the curriculum. Keep academic taxonomy consistent across the system.

examsManagement.description: Design final exams, manage certificate templates, and oversee evaluation workflows. Control how assessments and credentials are delivered.

badgeManagement.description: Create achievement badges and define how learners earn them. Manage badge visuals, criteria, and visibility across the platform.

supportTickets.description: Handle support requests and disputes from users. Review ticket details, respond to issues, and track resolution progress.

resultsAnalytics.description: Analyze student performance, quiz outcomes, and certificate progress. Explore dashboards that turn results into actionable insights.

helper.description: Find guides and quick references for using the admin panel. Learn how each section works and where to go for common tasks.

settings.description: Adjust admin preferences, integrations, and platform configuration. Keep your workspace and system options up to date.
